_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform AI architecture security reviews, identify gaps, and develop a risk management plan to address issues.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI systems, attack surface analysis, and control gap identification.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-010 (SP, cosine: 0.677), SP-T-001 (SP, cosine: 0.655).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.6/10 (raw 0.764). Shared vocabulary: [ai, security]. DCWF-only terms [address, architecture, develop, gaps, identify, issues] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control, gap] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.907 (P=0.909, R=0.905). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (99.2%). The model interprets "Perform AI architecture security reviews, identify gaps, and develop a risk mana" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in conducting AI security assessments, including threat modeling for AI sy" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Equal' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.680 < STS 0.764 (gap -0.085). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [address, architecture, develop] and [analysis, assessments, attack] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [ai, security]. DCWF-only: [address, architecture, develop, gaps, identify, issues]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, assessments, attack, conducting, control, gap].
